set_fields.description: When a Ralph-owned child session finishes via ralph_finish, the Ralph loop controller/child capability contract remains active in the session file. The default session agent/tool configuration is not restored, leaving non-Finder agents disabled after the loop exits. Root cause and fix should preserve session-file ownership semantics: Ralph contract is active only while a Ralph session owns the session file; after finish/cleanup, restore the normal session defaults/config.
